title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a built-in model registry and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package providing LangChain LLM, chat and embeddings interfaces backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model support and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI frontend for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes and mini-projects showing how to use Ollama with Python, Go, Rust, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, Postgres, and more.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Curated list of community-created Modelfiles for niche/domains (finance, medical, RPG).

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama on macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that leverages Ollama for multi-user, multi-model chat threads.

title: ollama-nest
summary: Experimental NestJS module providing injectable Ollama service with RxJS streams.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama and run model tests.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + ChromaDB + Chainlit UI.

title: ollama-express
summary: Minimal Express.js starter that mounts OpenAI-compatible routes proxying to Ollama.
